overall.description: A static cinematic shot from a high-fidelity game engine depicting a medieval fantasy dining hall with a massive dragon skeleton suspended from gothic vaulted ceilings. Natural morning light streams through tall arched windows, illuminating stone walls and wooden dining tables where several figures are seated.

scene_state.functional_zone: medieval great hall with suspended dragon skeleton

entered.detail: massive complete skeletal remains of a dragon suspended by chains from the ceiling
tall pointed arched windows with multiple panes allowing natural light entry
long rectangular wooden tables with benches arranged in rows

tall stone columns and walls with medieval architectural details
circular iron light fixture hanging from ceiling chains

segments.scene_description: A completely static view of a grand medieval dining hall featuring a massive dragon skeleton suspended from gothic vaulted ceilings. Warm natural light filters through tall arched windows on the left, illuminating the stone interior and wooden dining tables where several individuals remain seated throughout the duration.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot maintains a steady, cinematic gaze across a grand medieval dining hall where the atmosphere is defined by a sense of ancient stillness. It begins with a wide, static view of the stone interior, centering on a massive dragon skeleton suspended from the gothic vaulted ceilings. Warm natural light filters through tall arched windows on the left, casting a soft glow over the wooden dining tables. The scene remains poised and unchanging, keeping the seated figures and the architectural scale in a fixed, atmospheric composition.
